from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import Dict, List


@dataclass
class PipelineStage:
    name: str
    params: Dict[str, str] = field(default_factory=lambda: {"mode": "default"})
    steps: List[str] = field(default_factory=lambda: ["validate", "transform"])


@dataclass
class TrainingRun:
    run_id: str
    metrics: Dict[str, float] = field(default_factory=dict)
    artifacts: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
